title: Recording

errors.init_failed: Failed to initialize recording. Please check the console for details.
errors.pause_failed: Failed to pause recording. Please check the console for details.
errors.resume_failed: Failed to resume recording. Please check the console for details.
errors.device_mic_message:
Unable to access your microphone. Please check that:
• Your microphone is connected
• The app has microphone permissions
• No other app is using the microphone
errors.device_speaker_message:
Unable to capture system audio. Please check that:
• A virtual audio device (like BlackHole) is installed
• The app has screen recording permissions (macOS)
• System audio is properly configured
errors.device_permission_message:
Recording permissions are required. Please:
• Grant microphone access in System Settings
• Grant screen recording access for system audio (macOS)
• Restart the app after granting permissions
errors.device_generic_message: Unable to start recording. Please check your audio device settings and try again.

orphan_checkpoints_description: Meetily found audio left over from a previous session that did not finish saving. Recover it to keep the recording, or discard it to free disk space.
orphan_checkpoint_recovering: Recovery started. Watch the banner for progress.
